scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build --prefix ../frontend && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build --prefix ../frontend && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.dedup-off.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --config wrangler.jsonc --local
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging --remote
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --config wrangler.jsonc --env production --remote
